new_value: {"description":"Add .docx file support to the web app drop zone. When a user drops a Word document, extract raw text client-side using vendored mammoth.js and start a review session. See plans/2026-03-02-web-docx-upload.md and specs/09_web_docx_upload.feature.","issue_type":"epic"}

old_value: {"id":"fabbro-ax0","title":"Vendor mammoth.js into web/vendor/","description":"Download mammoth.browser.min.js (v1.x, BSD-2-Clause) and commit to web/vendor/. Add \u003cscript src='vendor/mammoth.browser.min.js'\u003e\u003c/script\u003e to app.html before the module script tag. Verify window.mammoth is available.","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","owner":"charly.vibes@proton.me","created_at":"2026-03-02T22:44:45Z","created_by":"charly vibes","updated_at":"2026-03-02T22:44:45Z"}

{"id":"fabbro-rxc","title":"Add .docx drop handling to web app","description":"In web/app.js drop handler: 1) Check for .doc before acceptedExts guard, show 'Legacy .doc files are not supported. Please save as .docx.' 2) Add .docx to acceptedExts Set. 3) Update drop zone label to mention .docx. 4) Add .docx branch: read as ArrayBuffer, call window.mammoth.extractRawText(), normalize line endings, check for empty text, start session. 5) Wrap in try/catch for corrupt files.","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","owner":"charly.vibes@proton.me","created_at":"2026-03-02T22:44:52Z","created_by":"charly vibes","updated_at":"2026-03-02T22:44:52Z"}
